iters.reward_changes: Added joint_jerk (mean-abs, w=-5e-4) and table_avoidance (tanh body-z gate, w=-0.5); increased joint_vel from -1e-4 to -5e-4. Robot moved +0.2m X for chassis-table clearance.
iters.diagnosis: Policy exploited arm-body-push shortcut: lifting_object=6.625 but grasping=0.006. EE never approached cube (reaching_block=0.081). Fix: gate lifting_object and cube_height on EE proximity.

iters.reward_changes: Gate lifting_object on EE proximity (new object_is_lifted_grasped, threshold=0.12m); gate cube_height on same proximity; increase reaching_block weight 1.0->2.0. Prevents arm-push shortcut.
iters.diagnosis: Policy approached cube (reaching=3.89) and lifted it (lifting=21.84) but never closed gripper (grasping=0.72 via proximity only, not actual closure). table_avoidance=-0.053 100x larger than iter_001. Fix: add explicit gripper closure reward, tighten proximity to 8cm, reduce table_avoidance weight.

iters.reward_changes: Added pre_grasp_reward (near AND gripper_closed, w=10.0); tightened proximity 12cm->8cm across all terms; reduced table_avoidance weight -0.5->-0.2.
iters.diagnosis: Hover-with-closed-gripper shortcut: pre_grasp=62.46 (93% of total) by keeping gripper closed near cube ON TABLE. Policy never lifted (lifting=0.015). pre_grasp had no cube-lifted gate. Fix: add minimal_height=0.04 gate to pre_grasp.

iters.reward_changes: Added minimal_height=0.04 gate to pre_grasp_reward, blocking hover shortcut.
iters.diagnosis: Policy completely abandoned gripper: pre_grasp=0.0, total reward collapsed to reaching_block=6.70 only. Root cause: BinaryJointPositionAction maps action<0->CLOSE, action>=0->OPEN. With PPO init near zero, gripper stays OPEN forever. Three-way conjunction (lifted AND near AND closed) never explored. Fix: swap open/close command expressions so action>=0->physically CLOSED (default rest state).

iters.reward_changes: Swap gripper BinaryJointPositionActionCfg: open_command=GRIPPER_CLOSED(0.0), close_command=GRIPPER_OPEN(0.0325). Now action>=0 (PPO default near-zero) -> physically CLOSED. Policy defaults to closed gripper; must output negative to open for approach, then release to close for grasp. pre_grasp three-way conjunction effectively becomes two-way (lifted AND near).
